1|/**
     2| * IVX Deploy Bridge — Cloudflare Worker
     3| *

     5| * RENDER_SERVICE_ID) are available via the Worker environment.

responseMessageContents.text:
The worker's environment variables are still showing the old masked credentials even after redeployment, which suggests the values stored in the project configuration haven't actually been updated—either the user's re-entry didn't save properly or they entered the same truncated values again.

Looking at the specifics: the Vercel key (60 characters, vck_****HTYQ) is being rejected with a 401 error, indicating it's either invalid, revoked, or the team lacks the necessary AI Gateway access. The Render key is only 10 characters long, which is clearly truncated since real Render keys are around 35 characters. I need to report these findings with clear evidence and ask the user to re-enter the credentials with very explicit instructions, possibly checking whether they accidentally pasted keys with extra whitespace or prefixes that got partially extracted.I've verified your credentials against the server and found both are invalid: your Vercel key is returning a 401 error (likely missing AI Gateway access or credits), and your Render key is truncated at only 10 characters instead of the expected ~35. I need you to generate fresh API keys from both services' dashboards and paste them back so I can test them.

envs.name: AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY
envs.description: BRAND-NEW Vercel AI Gateway key. Vercel dashboard → AI Gateway → API Keys → Create Key. Copy the whole value in one go. The old key (ends HTYQ) is dead — creating a new one is required.

envs.name: RENDER_API_KEY
envs.description: FULL Render API key — your last paste was cut to 10 characters. dashboard.render.com → Account Settings → API Keys → Create API Key. Copy the entire ~35-char value.

input.reason: Live server-side validation just proved both saved keys fail: the Vercel gateway key returns 401 (invalid or no AI Gateway access) and the Render key is truncated to 10 of ~35 characters. Fresh complete values are the only remaining blocker to deploying the chat fix.

responseMessageContents.title: Update app to use your GitHub and fix the chat room connection
